form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 7th of 9 at Fontainebleau on March 17 over 1400m, slow going 7 len behind Ipso Facto with 56.5kg at $43. Last start 13th of 15 at Fontainebleau on March 31 over 1400m, slow going 5.5 len behind Irbis carrying 58kg at $28. Impossible to make a case.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run favourite; won by a nose at Deauville All Weather April 8 over 1400m defeating Jiji My Love carrying 60kg at $2. The start before that 3rd of 14 at Fontainebleau on March 31 over 1400m, slow going 0.6 len behind Samagace Du Vivien carrying 57.5kg at $3.10. Confidence back and is worth following up.

form.formComment: Resuming today after a break of three-and-a-half months. First up last campaign eighth of 13 at Bordeaux November 21 over 1900m, 8 len behind Lachop carrying 54.5kg at $6.10. Keep in mind.
